mapper.select: SELECT MOVIE_ID , POSTER_URL , TITLE , MOVIE_RATING , TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY') AS openYear , TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'MM"월 "DD') AS openDate FROM MOVIE

SELECT MOVIE_ID , POSTER_URL , TITLE , MOVIE_RATING , TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY') AS openYear , TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS openDate , OPEN_COUNTRY , RUNNING_TIME , INTRODUCE , SYNOPSIS , ORIGINAL_TITLE , STATE , LANGUAGE , BUDGET , PROFIT FROM MOVIE WHERE MOVIE_ID = #{_parameter}
